tarz: Topu Almak İçin Gerilere Kadar Gelir
ARZU AKKURT.scout_notu: Arzu Akkurt is a 21-year-old Turkish attacking midfielder who provides technical rotation depth for Galatasaray's central unit. She exhibits fine short combinations and comfortable first touch mechanics when operating between the lines. However, she lacks the explosive pace and high-tempo physical durability required to consistently unlock tight defensive blocks in international or elite-tier matchups. She remains a solid domestic depth asset.

tarz: Başarılıı Plase veya Kavisli Şut/Orta Dener
BENAN ALTINTAŞ.scout_notu: Benan Altintas is a 24-year-old Turkish international left midfielder who naturally covers the entire left flank with her continuous running capacity and high work rate. Utilizing her strong left foot, she provides valuable tactical balance, defensive coverage during transitions, and direct crossing delivery from wide areas. While her linear acceleration is a proven local asset, her creative vision in congested half-spaces requires further refinement.

tarz: Topu Almak İçin Gerilere Kadar Gelir
BERRA PEKGÖZ.scout_notu: Berra Pekgoz is a raw, promising 19-year-old central midfielder who serves as a developmental depth project for Galatasaray. A regular figure in youth national teams, she showcases solid foundational positioning and spatial awareness in the middle third. Her passing tempo and defensive execution are still unpolished for top-tier senior matches, but she possesses the natural spatial instincts to grow significantly over the next 3-4 years.

tarz: Şut Çekmek Yerine Pas Vermeyi Tercih Eder
Topu Almak İçin Gerilere Kadar Gelir
CHANG JANG.scout_notu: Jang Chang is an experienced 30-year-old South Korean international midfielder possessing high technical command and deep tactical vision. Operating mostly as a deep-lying playmaker or central controller, her left foot offers excellent distribution, accurate switching of play, and intelligent short combinations. She excels at controlling the game's tempo under pressure. However, her physical power and recovery speed in wide spaces represent distinct limitations against dynamic European systems.

DANA MARGARETHA WILHELMINA FOEDERER.scout_notu: Dana Foederer is a highly dynamic 23-year-old Dutch central midfielder who serves as a box-to-box engine. Educated in elite European structures, she exhibits strong positioning, continuous physical output, and tactical flexibility. She is very effective at linking the defensive transition to the final third, showcasing precise short passing and sound decision-making. Her performance represents a core modern pillar for the midfield unit with solid durability.

tarz: Başarılıı Plase veya Kavisli Şut/Orta Dener
EBRU TOPÇU.scout_notu: Ebru Topcu is a premier 29-year-old Turkish international playmaker who serves as a vital creative engine for both club and country. Operating effortlessly across advanced midfield zones, she combines excellent vision, set-piece precision, and clinical distribution. She demonstrates reliable calmness under pressure and exceptional leadership traits. Her tactical flexibility allows her to excel in linking lines, though her tracking back in rapid defensive transitions is slightly limited by her linear speed.

ECEM CUMERT.scout_notu: Ecem Cumert is an energetic 28-year-old Turkish international full-back/wing-back capable of dominating the entire right flank. Born and educated in Germany, she demonstrates clean technical fundamentals, high continuous athletic output, and dependable linear speed. She is highly proactive in flanking overlaps and direct crossing delivery, providing continuous numbers in the third zone. While her defensive recovery is robust, her strict positioning inside the half-spaces can improve under compact pressure.

EDA KARATAŞ.scout_notu: Eda Karatas is an experienced 31-year-old Turkish international centre-back who brings reliable defensive stability and leadership to the back line. An intelligent reader of space, she excels at tactical positioning, aerial command, and inside-the-box block management. She avoids unnecessary risks by enforcing position security. Due to natural age progression, her acceleration in wide spaces represents a clear limitation when exposed to quick transitional counter-attacks.

tarz: Başarılıı Plase veya Kavisli Şut/Orta Dener
ELİF KESKİN.scout_notu: Elif Keskin is an exciting 24-year-old Turkish international winger who offers dynamic ball progression and direct offensive threat from wide areas. Possessing exceptional initial acceleration and sharp agility, she thrives in 1v1 isolated duels and high-tempo transitional runs. Her technical facility allows her to carry the ball efficiently into advanced inner channels, although her final zone shot choices and final box composure remain in a phase of development.

İREM EREN.scout_notu: Irem Eren is a disciplined 25-year-old Turkish central midfielder who acts as a dependable squad rotation option for Galatasaray. She shows reliable stamina, tidy defensive screening instincts, and simple low-risk distribution logic. While she provides steady physical cover in domestic transitions, her tactical speed under intense pressing and long-range progressive ball execution are fairly limited at higher senior competitive tiers.

tarz: Başarılıı Plase veya Kavisli Şut/Orta Dener
JULIA HICKELSBERGEN FULLER.scout_notu: Julia Hickelsberger-Fuller is a highly dynamic 26-year-old Austrian international winger who adds elite linear velocity and direct baseline stretching threats to Galatasaray's frontline. Possessing exceptional initial acceleration and crossing precision, she thrives at isolating opposing fullbacks and delivering high-quality service into the box. Her robust European physical standards allow her to resist heavy challenges, though her inside channel shot choices occasionally remain predictable.

KEZBAN TAĞ.scout_notu: Kezban Tag is an experienced 32-year-old Turkish international central defender offering steady spatial coverage and tactical leadership. Highly intelligent in low-risk block systems, she stands out in tight box-marking duties, aerial duels, and defensive positioning. She prefers secure clearance choices rather than complex ball progression. Her recovery speed over wide channels is a noted liability when forced into high defensive lines against swift counter-attacking transitions.

tarz: Başarılıı Plase veya Kavisli Şut/Orta Dener
LALIA DALI USAGE STORTI.scout_notu: Lalia Dali-Storti is a technically highly sophisticated 32-year-old French winger/forward who operates with precision from wide advanced positions. Utilizing her cultured left foot, she excels at inverted driving runs into half-spaces, clever quick combinational linkups, and producing unpredictable shooting options from range. Her experienced tactical maturity aids her in off-the-ball movements, though her raw tracking stamina is slightly reduced in prolonged physical defensive blocks.

tarz: Şut Çekmek Yerine Pas Vermeyi Tercih Eder
LINA YANG.scout_notu: Yang Lina is an elegant and highly composed 32-year-old Chinese international defensive midfielder who orchestrates operations from the deep third. Possessing strong technical control, smooth distribution mechanics, and top-tier reading of defensive phases, she excels at recovering possession and executing swift line-breaking diagonal balls. Her experience in major global formats gives her supreme calm under aggressive midfield pressure, easily dictating the overall competitive tempo.

tarz: Başarılıı Plase veya Kavisli Şut/Orta Dener
Kaleye Sırtı Dönük Oynayabilir - İstasyon Olabilir
MARIE GISELE DIVINE NGAH MANGA.scout_notu: Marie Gisele Divine Ngah Manga is a powerful and highly athletic 23-year-old Cameroonian international striker who functions as a complete frontman. She possesses outstanding sudden acceleration, physical core strength, and reliable off-the-ball instincts inside the final third. Her dynamic presence allows her to shield possession effectively and exploit defensive spaces during quick transitions, although her deep play linkup passes in highly compact midfields remain an area for further tactical polishing.

tarz: Başarılıı Plase veya Kavisli Şut/Orta Dener
MARTA NAIZIA DA SILVA CINTRA.scout_notu: Marta Cintra is an technically elegant 26-year-old Brazilian winger who creates constant danger from the right corridor. Displaying typical South American ball comfort and slick dribbling flair, she excels at cutting inside onto half-spaces to deliver cross combinations or test the keeper from distance. Her physical frame helps her maintain balance during heavy contact phases, while her defensive shielding continuity under high block pressure is still developing.

tarz: Topu Almak İçin Gerilere Kadar Gelir
MELİKE ÖZTÜRK.scout_notu: Melike Ozturk is a 25-year-old Turkish international forward who serves as an agile second striker or pocket link player. She is highly active when dropping deep to receive possession and drag opposing centrebacks out of structure, displaying clean short layoffs and earnest movement. While her continuous high mobility is a solid asset in tracking transitions locally, her physical strength against elite rigid defensive units represents a functional limit.

tarz: Başarılıı Plase veya Kavisli Şut/Orta Dener
Kaleye Sırtı Dönük Oynayabilir - İstasyon Olabilir
MELİKE PEKEL.scout_notu: Melike Pekel is an experienced 31-year-old forward born in Germany who brings solid physical presence and past European experience to the squad rotation. Primarily operating as a straight-line winger or penalty-box reference, she relies on intelligent structural anchoring and powerful direct running. Following major injury periods, her past explosive transitional speed has naturally declined, leaving her as a localized depth tool for short-burst tactical situations.

NARİN YAKUT.scout_notu: Narin Yakut is a 22-year-old Turkish central defender providing squad rotation depth for Galatasaray's back line. She concentrates purely on basic structural parseling, man-marking duties, and low-risk clearance execution under localized pressure. At her current development phase, her reaction tempo against complex off-the-ball runs and elite transitional pace remains raw. She represents a disciplined, steady project player for future domestic integration.

OLUWATOSIN BLESSING DEMEHIN.scout_notu: Oluwatosin Blessing Demehin is a robust 24-year-old Nigerian international center-back who brings immense athletic density and elite recovery strength to the defense. Educated in major tournament environments with Nigeria, she excels at tight man-marking, aerial box-clearances, and physical ground duels. However, her short passing range and ball control under intense pressing blocks represent noticeable technical restrictions.

tarz: Başarılıı Plase veya Kavisli Şut/Orta Dener
Kaleye Sırtı Dönük Oynayabilir - İstasyon Olabilir
VALENTINA GIACINTI.scout_notu: Valentina Giacinti is a highly decorated 32-year-old Italian international striker who sets the absolute benchmark for clinical finishing and off-the-ball penalty-box poaching. Her positioning inside the final third, tactical awareness, and shooting variety under defensive clutter are top tier. While she maintains immense composure, her physical speed in recovery phases and willingness to execute high press blocks are significantly low.

tarz: Kaleye Sırtı Dönük Oynayabilir - İstasyon Olabilir
VITORIA SILVA DE ALMEIDA.scout_notu: Vitoria Silva de Almeida is a physically imposing 26-year-old Brazilian forward who acts as an effective target reference in the frontline. She stands out in back-to-goal shielding, aerial box presence, and rough omuza omuza challenges against rigid defensive setups. However, her turning acceleration and agility in quick transitional combinations remain clear athletic limitations.

AMIRA OULD BRAHAM.scout_notu: Amira Ould Braham is an experienced Algerian international defensive midfielder who provides high structural discipline and ball recovery numbers. Operating as a pure anchor, she reading spaces cleanly and excels in aggressive ground duels. While her short-range passing is safe under pressure, her advanced creative distribution remains basic.

ARMERA TUKAJ.scout_notu: Armera Tukaj is a disciplined Albanian international central defender who offers strong aerial dominance and reliable inside-the-box clearances. She naturally thrives in low-block lines owing to her physical core balance. Her lack of turning acceleration limits her efficiency when drawn into high lines.

tarz: Başarılıı Plase veya Kavisli Şut/Orta Dener
Kaleye Sırtı Dönük Oynayabilir - İstasyon Olabilir
ASİA BRAGONZİ.scout_notu: Asia Bragonzi is a highly clinical Italian international forward possessing elite off-the-ball penalty box intuition and finishing variety. Her intelligent movement between channels creates continuous mismatch opportunities in local competition. She avoids tracking back heavily, preserving output for attacking zones.

AZRA ARDOS.scout_notu: Azra Ardos is a young 21-year-old Turkish wingback providing honest work rate and dependable linear running paths along the right channel. She is highly proactive during attacking overlaps, although her technical final-ball crossing delivery and structural defensive positioning remain raw project traits.

tarz: Kol Boyu Sayesinde Yan Toplarda Etkili Olur

BERNA YENİÇERİ.scout_notu: Berna Yeniceri is a 30-year-old experienced Turkish full-back who provides strict defensive coverage and localized positional discipline. Operating primarily in low-risk defensive phases, she excels at simple line management and standard man-marking. Her advanced attacking overlap and crossing acceleration remain limited by tactical speed preferences.

tarz: Başarılıı Plase veya Kavisli Şut/Orta Dener
BİRGÜL SADIKOĞLU.scout_notu: Birgul Sadikoglu is an agile 25-year-old Turkish international winger who offers dynamic direct play from the left channel. Possessing commendable ball progression and 1v1 dribbling execution, she frequently drives into the inner spaces to unlock scoring combinations. Her cross precision and transition awareness are solid assets, though her finishing composure can develop further.

CHIOMA OLISE.scout_notu: Chioma Olise is a 21-year-old Nigerian central midfielder who operates with honest tactical work rate and reliable physical resilience. Acting as a classic defensive screener, she concentrates on short combinations and ground duel interceptions. Her creative deep progressive distribution and technical range are raw developmental traits at high senior tiers.

DIANA LUCAS MSEWA.scout_notu: Diana Lucas Msewa is a physically sound 23-year-old Tanzanian international midfielder providing reliable work rate and physical containment in the middle third. She prioritizes low-risk ball retention and physical containment over complex deep creative choices. Her lateral transition speed remains a structural limitation when matching rapid vertical systems.

tarz: Topu Almak İçin Gerilere Kadar Gelir
DİLAN BORA.scout_notu: Dilan Bora is a mobile 24-year-old forward option who acts as an active link player or secondary striker. She displays commendable willingness to drop between lines to collect possession and link the intermediate build-up play. Her final third clinical finishing variety and body core balance against robust central defenders remain unpolished.

DONJETA HALILAJ.scout_notu: Donjeta Halilaj is a highly creative 26-year-old Kosovar international attacking midfielder playing as a classic number 10. She displays fine technical control, neat half-space positioning, and a high willingness to try defense-splitting progressive passes. While she thrives when dictating technical rhythms in the opposing third, her physical dueling core and transitional covering capacity are moderate restrictions.

tarz: Kaleye Sırtı Dönük Oynayabilir - İstasyon Olabilir
ELENA SHESTERNEVA.scout_notu: Elena Shesterneva is an active 26-year-old Russian forward who operates as a disciplined defensive focal point in the attacking line. She shows excellent work rate when executing high blocks and shielding possession for arriving runners. Her straight-line speed helps stretch defenses effectively, while her micro penalty box finishing variety requires higher consistency.

FATLINDA RAMAJ.scout_notu: Fatlinda Ramaj is a 25-year-old Kosovar defensive midfielder acting as a localized squad depth option. She focuses on low-risk short distributions and basic positional containment duties in the central third. Her execution speed against fast vertical systems and progressive technical range are significant constraints at the high senior tier.

tarz: Şut Çekmek Yerine Pas Vermeyi Tercih Eder
FATMA KARA.scout_notu: Fatma Kara is a highly experienced 35-year-old Turkish veteran midfielder operating as a deep playmaker. Possessing refined basic vision and tidy distribution skills, she commands the tempo comfortably under minimal localized tracking. Due to natural age progression, her physical stamina blocks and covering speed represent clear constraints.

FATMA SARE ÖZTÜRK.scout_notu: Fatma Sare Ozturk is a raw 20-year-old Turkish central defender acting as a long-term development depth project. She keeps her game disciplined around position loyalty and simple secure clearances. She requires substantial growth regarding physical core strength, tactical anticipation, and high-intensity match speed adaptation.

tarz: Topu Almak İçin Gerilere Kadar Gelir
JAYLEN KENNEDY CRIM.scout_notu: Jaylen Kennedy Crim is an active 28-year-old American second striker providing tidy short combinations and high continuous movement between channels. She drops back intelligently to retrieve possession and carry vertical momentum forward. Her body core strength against heavy centre-backs and raw shot power are developmental traits.

KALTRINA BIQKAJ.scout_notu: Kaltrina Biqkaj is a 25-year-old Kosovar international winger who operating with dynamic running paths from the left corridor. She shows proactive intent to drive inside into advanced half-spaces to cross or combine. Her physical dueling continuity and overall crossing accuracy under heavy pres remain raw.

MADINATOU ROUAMBA.scout_notu: Madinatou Rouamba is a physically reliable 24-year-old Burkinabe international defender who brings outstanding aerial clearing command and robust inside-the-box marking stability. She reads spatial lines safely in low-block layouts, while her swift turning recovery represents a notable constraint against fast vertical forwards.

tarz: Başarılıı Plase veya Kavisli Şut/Orta Dener
NATALIA OLESZKIEWICZ.scout_notu: Natalia Oleszkiewicz is a highly refined 24-year-old Polish international forward who operates with creative velocity and direct threat from wide spaces. She possesses crisp dribbling mechanics and excellent timing when executing inside cuts onto advanced areas. Her final-zone service delivery is elite, though her tracking commitment in defensive phases can grow.

tarz: Kol Boyu Sayesinde Yan Toplarda Etkili Olur

PAULA RUESS.scout_notu: Paula Ruess is a 26-year-old German central defender who serves as a position-oriented squad option. She shows reliable low-block spatial placement and disciplined marking awareness. Her lateral turning agility and raw explosive acceleration are clear constraints when drawn out against rapid transition attacks.

RABİA NUR KÜÇÜK.scout_notu: Rabia Nur Kucuk is a young 22-year-old Turkish left-back who acts as a balanced full-back for squad depth. She maintains consistent running paths along the flank and earnest defensive backing. Her progressive final-third crossing precision and individual 1v1 defensive containment technique require further technical polishing.

RABİYA İSGİ.scout_notu: Rabiya Isgi is a 23-year-old Turkish wingback providing standard athletic work rate and reliable overlapping runs along the right corridor. She offers useful pacing in quick transitional moves, although her defensive tracking coordination and cross execution variety under high-pressure lines remain raw.

SEMA POLAT.scout_notu: Sema Polat is an experienced 27-year-old Turkish defender acting as a physical central anchor in the back line. She concentrates purely on standard box clearances, physical duels, and low-risk marking blocks. Her recovery pace and reaction speed against nimble vertical forwards represent a major liability in open spaces.

tarz: Kaleye Sırtı Dönük Oynayabilir - İstasyon Olabilir
VALENTINA TROKA.scout_notu: Valentina Troka is a 23-year-old Albanian forward playing as a physical target reference in the front line. She utilizes her height and upper body frame for standard back-to-goal hold ups and aerial box knockdowns. Her overall turning agility, link-up pass variety, and shot creation speed remain unrefined project traits.
